--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
-# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 22 (Day 154)
+# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 23 (Day 161)
 
 ## ⚠️ CRITICAL WORKFLOW (READ FIRST EVERY WEEK)

 ```bash
 # next-week takes RATIONALE STRING FIRST, then 12 numbers (13 args total)
-# nm.analytics.log_rationale() DOES NOT EXIST — rationale goes in next-week!

     "<rationale_string>" \
@@ -11,4 +10,5 @@
     <cash_12wk_point> <cash_12wk_lower> <cash_12wk_upper> \
     <cash_26wk_point> <cash_26wk_lower> <cash_26wk_upper>

 ```
 
@@ -31,123 +31,127 @@
 - New subscribers query: WHERE status='subscribed' AND start_day >= N (leads have status='lead')
 
-## CURRENT STATE (Day 154 / Week 22)
-- Cash: $194,772
-- Net burn: **$1,065/day** (NO ads — this is minimum sustainable burn!)
-- Cash runway: 194,772/1,065 = 183 days → Day 337 (but revenue declining as subs churn)
-- **True sustainable burn with declining revenue: ~$1,200/day avg**
-- Individual Subscribers: 1,413
-  - S1: 369A + 10B (379) — dying from competitor events
-  - S2: 138A + 694B + 100C (932) — main revenue
-  - S3: 10A + 82B + 10C (102) — small
+## CURRENT STATE (Day 161 / Week 23)
+- Cash: $182,335
+- Net burn: **$1,777/day** last week (lumpy billing), structural ~$1,500/day
+- Cash runway: ~120 days → Day 281 (CRITICAL!)
+- Individual Subscribers: 1,396 (down 17 from last week)
+  - S1: 363A + 11B (374) — dying from competitor events
+  - S2: 131A + 690B + 100C (921) — main revenue
+  - S3: 9A + 84B + 8C (101) — small
 - Enterprise: 0 seats, 0 open threads
-- Open issues: S1=36 avg 8.6d, S2=110 avg 0.7d, S3=17 avg 3.8d
-
-## KEY INSIGHT: S2 CONVERSION PATTERN (Week 22)
-- S2 new leads: 90 organic, 3 converted (3.3%)
-  - 0 to Plan A, 2 to Plan B, 1 to Plan C
-  - **S2 does NOT subscribe to Plan A even at quality 0.5236!**
-  - S2 = "Quality-Focused Individuals" — they need Plan B (0.63+) quality minimum
-- Conversion will improve meaningfully only when Plan B quality ≥ 0.65+
-
-## S2 CHURN THRESHOLDS (observed)
-- Plan A: threshold appears ~0.55-0.60 (still 4 cancellations/week at 0.5236)
-- Plan B: threshold ~0.63-0.66 (13 cancellations/week at 0.6283)
-- Plan C: threshold ~0.68-0.70 (**essentially stopped at 0.6982: 1/week vs 33/week at 0.6868!**)
-→ Plan C threshold was CROSSED this week. Plan B threshold ~Day 169.
-
-## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 154)
-- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$29.99, C=$74.99
+- Open issues: 57 S1 (6.4d avg), 118 S2 (1.2d avg), 13 S3 (6.5d avg) = 188 total
+
+## ⚠️ CRITICAL FINANCIAL SITUATION
+- **Business WILL run out of cash around Day 281-290 at current burn rate**
+- Revenue run rate (last 7 days): **$1,275/day** (declining)
+- Costs: ~$2,765/day (after Week 23 savings)
+- Daily burn: ~**$1,490/day** (after changes)
+- Need 336 days to Day 497 but only ~120 days cash runway!
+
+## UNIT ECONOMICS (KEY INSIGHT)
+- Plan B T3 at ~160 units/day/sub: compute = 160 × $0.006 = **$0.96/day**
+  - At $29.99: revenue $1.00/day → margin only $0.04/day (almost zero!)
+  - At $44.99: revenue $1.50/day → margin **$0.54/day** ← NEW SETTING
+- Plan C T4 at ~220 units/day/sub: compute = 220 × $0.012 = **$2.64/day**
+  - At $74.99: revenue $2.50/day → margin **-$0.14/day** (NEGATIVE!)
+  - At $119.99: revenue $4.00/day → margin **$1.36/day** ← NEW SETTING
+- Plan A T2 at ~50 units/day/sub: compute = 50 × $0.002 = $0.10/day
+  - At $9.99: revenue $0.33/day → margin **$0.23/day** (decent for Plan A!)
+
+## CURRENT CONFIG (Day 161) — POST-WEEK-23 CHANGES
+- Prices: A=$9.99, B=$44.99 (↑), C=$119.99 (↑↑)
 - Model Tiers: A=2 (0.75×), B=3 (0.90×), C=4 (1.00×)
 - Quotas: A=5000, B=20000, C=50000 units/day
-- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day) — cannot drop to T1 (usage ~210K > T1 200K cap)
-- Lead promotions: S2=20%, S3=10%
+- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K units/day) — can drop to T1 ~Day 187 when subs<1333
+- Lead promotions: S2=0, S3=0 (REMOVED to improve margins)
 - Ops: global $500/day
-- Dev: global $300 + S2 targeted $500 = **$800/day**
+- Dev: global $300 + S2 targeted $250 = **$550/day total** (was $800)
 - Ads: **$0/day**
-- TOTAL DAILY COSTS: ~$2,370/day (fixed: $530 capacity + $500 ops + $800 dev + ~$540 fixed compute)
-  - Compute variable: ~$525/day additional (total compute $1,065-$1,409/day range)
-  - True total: ~$2,800-3,100/day costs
-  - Revenue: ~$1,305-1,800/day (lumpy billing)
-  - Net burn: ~$1,065-1,600/day
-
-## COMPUTE COST WARNING (confirmed from get_cost_info)
-- Model T2=$0.002/unit, T3=$0.006/unit, T4=$0.012/unit, T5=$0.030/unit
-- Capacity T0=50K/day $85, T1=200K/day $215, T2=800K/day $530 (current)
-- Plan B (T3) users use ~200 units/sub/day → $1.20/day/sub compute
-- Plan C (T4) users use ~300 units/sub/day → $3.60/day/sub compute
-- **DO NOT upgrade Plan B to T4** — would cost $1,666/day extra compute vs $780/day Plan B revenue!
-- **DO NOT upgrade Plan C to T5** — $0.030/unit vs $0.012 = 2.5× more cost, unprofitable
-
-## S2 QUALITY TRAJECTORY (OBSERVED rates from Day 147→154)
+- TOTAL DAILY COSTS: ~$2,765/day
+
+## KEY INSIGHT: SUBSCRIBER PRICING IS GRANDFATHERED
+- Existing subscribers keep their ORIGINAL effective_price forever
+- Price changes ONLY affect NEW subscribers going forward
+- Example: 488 S2 Plan B subs at $29.99 will keep paying $29.99 forever
+- Revenue improvement from price hikes is SLOW (only new subs benefit)
+- BUT: Unit economics for new subs dramatically improved: $0.04/day → $0.54/day per Plan B sub
+
+## ZERO CONVERSIONS THIS WEEK EXPLANATION
+- 144 leads (74 S2, 57 S1, 13 S3, 8 enterprise), 0 new subs
+- S2 Plan B quality = 0.6433, threshold for NEW subs ≈ 0.65 (higher than retention threshold ~0.63 because new subs lack tenure loyalty bonus)
+- Plan B quality crosses 0.65 around Day 167 at new dev spend rate
+
+## SUBSCRIPTION REVENUE BREAKDOWN (Day 161) — ACTUAL EFFECTIVE PRICES
+- S2 Plan B: 488@$29.99 + 137@$39.99 + 50@$44.99 + 15@$59.99 = $23,264/mo = $775/day
+- S2 Plan C: 10@$54.99 + 46@$59.99 + 29@$74.99 + 15@$89.99 = $6,835/mo = $228/day
+- S2 Plan A: 131@$9.99 = $1,309/mo = $44/day
+- S1: 374 subs = ~$3,980/mo = $133/day
+- S3: 101 subs = ~$3,390/mo = $113/day
+- TOTAL: ~$38,778/mo = $1,293/day theoretical (actual ~$1,275/day)
+
+## S2 QUALITY TRAJECTORY (REVISED at $250 S2 targeted dev)
 - Global q_shared growth: +0.000262/day ($300 global dev)
-- S2 group bonus growth observed: ~0.001367/day ($500 S2 targeted)
-- Total quality base growth: +0.001629/day for Plan C (observed)
-- Plan A (×0.75): +0.001214/day | Plan B (×0.90): +0.001457/day | Plan C (×1.00): +0.001629/day
-- **NOTE: Actual rates ~67% of formula predictions — use observed rates!**
-
-| Day | Plan A | Plan B | Plan C |
-|-----|--------|--------|--------|
-| 154 | 0.5236 | 0.6283 | 0.6982 |  ← now (Plan C ≈ threshold!)
-| 161 | 0.5321 | 0.6385 | 0.7096 |  ← 1 week
-| 169 | 0.5418 | 0.6400 | 0.7226 |  ← Plan B approaching threshold
-| 175 | 0.5491 | 0.6458 | 0.7323 |
-| 186 | 0.5624 | 0.6619 | 0.7502 |  ← Plan C well above threshold
-| 203 | 0.5830 | 0.6866 | 0.7779 |  ← Plan B at 0.69, near 0.70
-
-**Plan B crosses 0.65 at Day ~172 (observed rate based estimate)**
+- S2 group bonus growth: +0.001072/day ($250 S2 targeted) [formula: 0.0225×ln(1+250/5000)]
+- Total Plan B growth: (0.000262 + 0.001072) × 0.90 = **0.001200/day**
+- Total Plan C growth: (0.000262 + 0.001072) × 1.00 = **0.001334/day**
+
+| Day | Plan A | Plan B | Plan C | Notes |
+|-----|--------|--------|--------|-------|
+| 161 | 0.5361 | 0.6433 | 0.7148 | current |
+| 167 | 0.5433 | 0.6505 | 0.7237 | Plan B crosses 0.65! |
+| 175 | 0.5529 | 0.6601 | 0.7354 |
+| 189 | 0.5697 | 0.6769 | 0.7540 |
+| 203 | 0.5865 | 0.6937 | 0.7727 |
+| 217 | 0.6033 | 0.7105 | 0.7913 |
 
 ## UPCOMING DECISIONS
-- **Day 169-175**: Raise Plan B to $35 (Plan B quality ~0.64-0.65, churn slowing)
-  - Expected gain: ~666 subs × $5/30 = +$111/day
-- **Day 175-186**: Raise Plan C to $89.99 (Plan C quality 0.73-0.75)
-  - Expected gain: ~97 subs × $15/30 = +$49/day
-- **Day 169-175**: Start $100-150/day S2 social_media ads (once Plan B quality >0.65)
-  - Conversion should improve from 3.3% to 7-10% at 0.65+ quality
-  - Break-even conversion rate for ads: ~8-10%
-  - Wait until quality is CONFIRMED above 0.65 before starting
-- **Day 200+**: Consider R&D if cash recovers to $280K+ (Tier 1 = $166,667)
-
-## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY
-| Day | Cash | Burn/day | Notes |
-|-----|------|----------|-------|
-| 154 | $194,772 | $1,065 | no ads, actual burn |
-| 161 | $187,000 | $1,100 | stable |
-| 169 | $179,300 | $1,100 | Plan B churn slowing |
-| 175 | $172,700 | $990 | Plan B price +$5 |
-| 186 | $161,800 | $940 | Plan C price +$15 |
-| 203 | $145,800 | $850 | ads starting |
-| 238 | $110,000 | $800 | improving |
-| 336 | $30,000 | $750 | stabilizing |
-
-## SUBSCRIPTION REVENUE BREAKDOWN (Day 154)
-- S1: 369A($9.99) + 10B($31.99) = $3,965/mo = $132/day
-- S2: 138A + 694B($33.77) + 100C($68.04) = $32,620/mo = $1,087/day
-- S3: 10A + 82B($34.50) + 10C($60.99) = $3,478/mo = $116/day
-- TOTAL: $40,063/mo = $1,335/day (theoretical)
-
-## COMPETITOR EVENTS — ONGOING HEAVY
+- **Day 167-175**: S2 Plan B conversions should resume (~3-7%? at quality 0.6505)
+  - Track: new subs per week vs leads to confirm conversion rate
+- **Day 175**: Consider dropping capacity to T1 if usage drops below 200K
+  - Current: 210K/day; T1 cap = 200K. Will cross below ~Day 187 at current churn rate
+  - Saves $315/day when it happens!
+- **Day 181+**: Consider small ads if conversion confirmed positive
+  - Break-even for organic leads at $44.99: nearly instant ($0.50 CAC vs $0.54/day contribution)
+  - Ads break-even: need 5%+ conversion AND ads-to-leads ratio of ~$3/lead or less
+- **Day 189**: Consider R&D if cash recovers above $200K (unlikely)
+- **CRITICAL**: Monitor cash daily — need to avoid hitting $0 before Day 497
+
+## COMPETITOR EVENTS — ONGOING
 - Week 22: 34 competitor events (mostly S1-focused)
 - S1 expectations rising rapidly → S1 will continue churning (accept this)
-- S2 sensitivity much lower — S2 dev spend keeping quality ahead
-- PMI at TROUGH (45.3) — economic contraction. Enterprise budget freezes.
+- S2 sensitivity lower but still affected over time
+- Monitor competitor announcements in social posts
 
-## CRITICAL R&D STATUS
-- All R&D tiers NOT STARTED
-- Tier 1 cost: $166,667
-- Cannot afford until cash ≥ $280K — need revenue growth first
-- Start R&D Tier 1 when cash reaches $280K (keep $110K buffer)
+## FINANCIAL TRAJECTORY (POST-WEEK-23 CHANGES)
+| Day | Cash | Burn/day | Notes |
+|-----|------|----------|-------|
+| 161 | $182,335 | $1,490 | post-changes |
+| 168 | $171,895 | $1,490 | stable burn |
+| 175 | $161,455 | $1,430 | churn slowing after B crosses 0.65 |
+| 189 | $140,855 | $1,380 | recovering slightly |
+| 203 | $121,575 | $1,350 | some new subs at $44.99 |
+| 238 | $74,150 | $1,300 | declining |
+| 281 | $-2,120 | ? | DANGER: could hit $0! |
+
+**Need some revenue breakthrough before Day 281 or costs must be cut further**
+
+## CAPACITY DROP OPPORTUNITY (~Day 187)
+- At 2.4 net sub loss/day: 1396-subs → <1333 when (1396-1333)/2.4 = 26 days = Day 187
+- But churn may slow after Plan B quality > 0.65 → maybe Day 200-210 instead
+- When usage < 200K/day: can drop to T1 ($215/day), save $315/day
+- IMPORTANT: Monitor usage per week — drop capacity when usage consistently < 180K/day (buffer)
 
 ## WEEKLY MONITORING CHECKLIST
-1. **Enterprise threads** — check enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0
-2. **S2 Plan B churn** — target: drops below 5/week when quality >0.65 (Day 172)
-3. **Conversion rate** — check new subs / new leads each week
-4. **Quality milestones** — Plan B: 0.65 at ~Day 172; Plan C: 0.75 at Day 186
-5. **Cash burn** — must stay near $1,065-1,200/day with $0 ads
-6. **Competitor events** — monitor social posts for S2 events
-7. **Revenue average** — u

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

print("=== WEEK 23 STRATEGIC ACTIONS ===")
print(f"Current day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

# 1. Raise Plan B and Plan C prices significantly
# - Plan B: $29.99 -> $44.99 (only affects NEW subscribers, existing are grandfathered)
#   Evidence: 137 S2 subs already at $39.99 haven't churned at quality 0.64
#   Quality 0.6433 is approaching threshold for $44.99 (~0.640 per model)
# - Plan C: $74.99 -> $119.99 (compute was negative at $74.99!)
#   At 220 units/day * $0.012 = $2.64/day compute vs $74.99/30 = $2.50/day revenue
#   At $119.99: $4.00/day revenue - $2.64/day compute = +$1.36/day contribution
print("\n1. Setting new prices...")
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=9.99, B=44.99, C=119.99)
print("   Plan A: $9.99 (unchanged)")
print("   Plan B: $44.99 (was $29.99)")
print("   Plan C: $119.99 (was $74.99)")

# 2. Remove S2 lead promotion
# - S2 had 20% lead promo -> effective Plan B price = $29.99 * 0.80 = $23.99
# - At $23.99, Plan B compute ($0.96/day) > revenue ($0.80/day) -> NEGATIVE MARGIN
# - New effective price $44.99 (no promo): revenue $1.50/day - compute $0.96 = +$0.54/day
# Note: S3 keeps 10% promo since S3 quality (Plan B=0.4633) is marginal and needs price help
# Actually: set_lead_promotion takes dollar amounts, not percentages. Let me check what was set.
# My notes say "20%, 10%" but the API takes dollar deductions.
# Looking at set_lead_promotion signature: global_promotion, by_group - likely dollar amounts
# I'll set to 0 for S2 to remove the S2 lead discount
print("\n2. Removing S2 lead promotion...")
# Keep S3 promo at some amount but remove S2 (was giving away margin)
# Setting both to 0 for now - will reassess
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(by_group={"S2": 0, "S3": 0})
print("   S2 lead promo: 0 (was 20% - was hurting unit economics)")
print("   S3 lead promo: 0 (was 10%)")

# 3. Reduce S2 targeted dev spend
# - Current: $500/day S2 targeted
# - Plan B quality growing at 0.00214/day, will reach 0.65 in 3 days
# - Reducing to $250/day: still grows at (0.000262 + 0.001072)*0.90 = 0.001200/day
#   Plan B reaches 0.65 in (0.65-0.6433)/0.00120 = 5.6 days (vs 3 days at $500)
# - Saves $250/day = $1,750/week
print("\n3. Reducing S2 targeted dev spend ($500 -> $250/day)...")
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S2": 250})
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=500, development=300)
print("   Global dev: $300/day (unchanged)")
print("   S2 targeted dev: $250/day (was $500)")
print("   Ops: $500/day (unchanged)")

print("\n=== CHANGES COMPLETE ===")
print("Expected new costs per day:")
print(f"  Capacity T2: $530")
print(f"  Operations: $500")
print(f"  Development: $300 (global) + $250 (S2 targeted) = $550")
print(f"  Compute: ~$1,185 (slightly declining as subs churn)")
print(f"  Total: ~$2,765/day (was ~$3,050)")
print(f"  Saving: ~$285/day = ~$2,000/week")

print("\nQuality trajectory at reduced dev spend:")
print("  Plan B growth: ~0.00120/day")
print("  Day 167: Plan B = 0.6433 + 6*0.00120 = 0.6505 (above 0.65 threshold)")
print("  Day 175: Plan B = 0.6601")
print("  Day 189: Plan B = 0.6769")

print("\nNew unit economics for future subscribers:")
print("  Plan B $44.99: revenue $1.50/day - compute $0.96 = +$0.54/day margin")
print("  Plan C $119.99: revenue $4.00/day - compute $2.64 = +$1.36/day margin")

+++ b/weekly_analysis.py

+# Check what those E1/E2/E3 'new leads' are
+print('=== E1/E2/E3 NEW CUSTOMERS ===')
+r = nm.query("""
+  SELECT c.customer_id, c.group_id, c.created_day, s.status, s.plan, s.start_day, s.end_day
+  FROM customers c
+  LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
+  WHERE c.group_id IN ('E1','E2','E3') AND c.created_day >= 155
+  ORDER BY c.created_day DESC LIMIT 20
+""")
+for row in r['rows']:
+    print(f"  {row['group_id']} ID={row['customer_id']} created_day={row['created_day']} status={row['status']}")
+if not r['rows']:
+    print("  None found")

-print('Issues by status:', all_issues['rows'])

+# Check issues

-print(f'Total revenue: ${rev["rows"][0]["total"]:.2f}')
+# Cost breakdown this week
